heading: Agency cooperation for inspection
label: 504 Agency cooperation for inspection

children.heading: .—Receiving Assistance
children.label: a .—Receiving Assistance
children.text: An executive agency may use the services, work, materials, and equipment of another executive agency, with the consent of the other executive agency, to inspect personal property incident to procuring the property.

children.heading: .—Providing Assistance
children.label: b .—Providing Assistance
children.text: Notwithstanding or any other law, an executive agency may provide services, work, materials, and equipment for purposes of this section without reimbursement or transfer of amounts.section 1301(a) of title 31

children.heading: .—Policies and Methods
children.label: c .—Policies and Methods
children.text: The use or provision of services, work, materials, and equipment under this section must be in conformity with policies and methods the Administrator of General Services prescribes under .section 501 of this title
